Data.Name: VKfunctionActivation
Data.Comment: Is VK function Activated or not; VK function is activated by default

Data.Name: RefreshAccesCodePeriod
Data.Comment: Switching period between broadcast of accesscode A and B.

Data.Name: RTCDesync
Data.Comment: If no time synchro between BLM & Cloud for more than 'RTCDesync', then BLM considers time has not sy

Data.Name: DefaultTokenValidityPeriod
Data.Comment: Token carries is validity but this is needed to check if Token is not valid for a too long period

Data.Name: VKIdlePowerBudget
Data.Comment: Time Period in which BLM stays in Indle mode (BLE broadcast) instead of going to DeepSleep (RequestT

Data.Name: CloseRental
Data.Comment: Duration between engine start revocation and doors permanently locked

Data.Name: CloudPuK
Data.Comment: Kamereon Public Key that enables BLM to Check Kamereon Token signatures. 2 Options: RSA and EC => 2

Data.Name: MaxTimeDrift
Data.Comment: Max clock drift to consider time is sync

Data.Name: CleanupB2CPeriod
Data.Comment: BLM shall clean-up all data related to a SP when this SP is not used during a long time

Data.Name: MaxSimultaneousSPBoundingTries
Data.Comment: Excessive number of tries for simultaneous SP

Data.Name: MaxLogStorage
Data.Comment: Max nb of logs stored in mem

Data.Name: SecureCmdAntiDelay
Data.Comment: Delay after which a secure cmd is refused

Data.Name: SuspendDelayTimer
Data.Comment: BLM waits <SuspendDelayTimer> before entering Suspend state

Data.Name: Manufacturing Data
Data.Comment: Renault or Nissan could buy a manuaturing ID from the BT signal.

Data.Name: Wrongrights
Data.Comment: This DID increments each time a command is refused because of invalid rights (Trying to start the vh

Data.Name: VKState
Data.Comment: Current VK state; used for Diagnostics

Data.Name: SWVersion
Data.Comment: Current SW version; used for Diag

Data.Name: NbOfSPListed
Data.Comment: Current number of SP listed; used for diag

Data.Name: HFMSecureKeyStatus
Data.Comment: Hold if there is a valid secured key for BLM cyphered channel

Data.Name: VKCurrentIdlePowerBudget
Data.Comment: Current value of the power budget

Data.Name: Enable Superlock
Data.Comment: The customer shall be able to accede to the “superlock” button only for Right Hand Drive vehicles ma

Data.Name: SPBatteryWarningLevel
Data.Comment: Level at which superlock is forbidden

Data.Name: VKIdlePowerBudgetWarningLevel
Data.Comment: Level at which superlock is forbidden

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer order number for a kit (assembled parts bought as a whole for production e.g. cockpit), when the spare part number designates only the server (e.g. for aftersales).

The record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Item.Text: DTC_BLM_ground_Short circuit to ground or open
DTC_BLM_supply_short circuit to ground or open

Data.Name: SPLockCmdDelay
Data.Comment: During this delay the SP (performing the command) is not locked (PIN code activation)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
DTC_BLM_ground_Short circuit to ground or open
DTC_BLM_supply_short circuit to ground or open
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: applicationSoftwareIdentification
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application software number(s).

The format of the application software identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: LockedSatusTimer
Data.Comment: BLM waits until <LockedStatusTimer > when checking the status locked from BCM. After timer expiry, B

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Test.Description: Action (lock, Unlock, start etc) refused because token is blacklisted
BCM sends wake-up request to BLM but BLM does not wake-up. This DTC is for BCM
BLM can request the badge status to HFM/BCM. This DTC is raised when no answer is received from HFM/BLM. NO answer received from BCM on 'CID status' request
This DTC is high until pairing with HFM has been succesfully performed
A message received from HFM is incorrect
Cyphered channel secured key send by HFM is invalid (wrong size, etc)
BLE secure paring with a SP has failed for any reason
Token is uncorrectly formated: missing fields, fields are out of range, uncorrectly formatted etc and verification is impossible
A token received is rejected because signature check fails
A token received is rejected because partner signature check fails
A suspend or resume is received while BLM is configured in B2B

Device.Name: DTC_BLM_supply_short circuit to ground or open
Device.Mnemonic: DTC_BLM_supply_short circuit to ground or open

Test.Description: DTC_BLM_supply_short circuit to ground or open

Device.Name: DTC_BLM_ground_Short circuit to ground or open
Device.Mnemonic: DTC_BLM_ground_Short circuit to ground or open

Test.Description: DTC_BLM_ground_Short circuit to ground or open
